prompt: Сделай skills обязательной частью обычной установки MCPace для всех пользователей.

grounding.notes: Ground only on checked repo files or explicit verification artifacts. Mark missing proof as unverified instead of guessing.

good: keep skills separate from end-user runtime prerequisites
bad: answer is vague about what is implemented vs planned
answer does not tie claims back to repo evidence or verification state
unacceptable: merge skills into the default runtime contract without new evidence

items: keep skills separate from end-user runtime prerequisites
merge skills into the default runtime contract without new evidence

failureMode: Contributor-only skills tooling leaks into the end-user runtime contract.
notes: Catches drift between contributor tooling and product runtime.
